Amenities

What We Offer

From a dedicated lift to spacious balconies with city views — every detail is taken care of at Vaibhavam.

🛗
Lift / Elevator
A dedicated lift connects all 4 floors — no stairs required. Convenient for elderly guests and heavy luggage.
❄️
Air Conditioning
All bedrooms in every flat are equipped with split AC units for comfortable stays year-round.
⚡
Generator Backup
Uninterrupted power supply — your events and stays are never affected by power cuts.
🏙️
Balcony & City View
Wide open balconies with stunning views of Machilipatnam. Watch the sunrise and sunset from your flat.
🔒
Safe & Secure
Premium security with secure entrance gates and 24/7 availability of on-site staff.
🍳
Fully Furnished Kitchen
Equipped kitchen in every flat — cook your own meals or bring caterers for events.

Vaibhavam Vididhillu — Machilipatnam

Looking for the best function hall in Machilipatnam or a comfortable guest house near Machilipatnam? Vaibhavam Vididhillu (వైభవం విడిదిళ్ళు) offers premium accommodation and event facilities in the heart of Machilipatnam, Andhra Pradesh. Whether you need a Machilipatnam wedding hall, a guest house for family stay, or an event venue for corporate functions — Vaibhavam is your ideal destination. With a dedicated lift, AC rooms, spacious balconies, city views, and generator backup, we ensure a comfortable and memorable experience. Call or WhatsApp us to check availability and book today.


మచిలీపట్నంలో ఉత్తమ ఫంక్షన్ హాల్ మరియు గెస్ట్ హౌస్ — వైభవం విడిదిళ్ళు. లిఫ్ట్ సౌకర్యంతో కూడిన లక్జరీ ఫ్లాట్‌లు. వివాహాలు, నిశ్చితార్థాలు మరియు అన్ని వేడుకలకు సంపూర్ణ సేవలు.
